description_long: This is a modern, deep-seated sofa with a dark charcoal fabric upholstery and a minimalist, boxy silhouette. The sofa features two large seat cushions and a total of eight loose back and side cushions, including one smaller rectangular cushion for added comfort and support. The armrests are straight, flat, and at the same height as the backrest, giving the piece a clean, contemporary look. The legs are short, block-shaped, and made of wood, slightly elevating the sofa off the ground. The upholstery appears to be a solid, matte fabric with a subtle texture, and the overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden frame with plush foam filling. This sofa would be well-suited for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, modern living rooms, or stylish waiting areas.
description: A modern, dark charcoal sofa with straight armrests, multiple loose cushions, and short wooden block legs. The upholstery is solid and subtly textured, giving it a contemporary and comfortable appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, two large seat cushions, and eight loose back and side cushions, including a small rectangular cushion.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, flat armrest, the depth of the seat, and the arrangement of the back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the backs of the loose cushions, with the wooden legs visible at the corners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the straight armrest and the layered arrangement of cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large seat cushions and eight loose back and side cushions, including one smaller rectangular cushion; all cushions are uniform in color and appear loose and plush.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, flat armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy profile and no visible decorative elements or padding contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-shaped wooden legs positioned at the corners, slightly exposed and finished in a natural wood tone.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest at medium height, with multiple loose cushions providing support; no tufting or channeling visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark charcoal fabric with a subtle, matte texture and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
